steps.title: Set up the equation with the given profit
steps.content:
We want to find how many posters must be sold to earn a profit of \$900. Set $p(x) = 900$ in the given function:
$$5x - 220 = 900$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Add 220 to both sides:
$$5x = 1120$$
Divide both sides by 5:
$$x = 224$$
The student council must sell 224 posters to earn the desired profit.
